features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Underwater predator with blood frenzy
tactical_info.positioning: Hunts wounded targets for advantage on attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 14 piercing per hit with advantage against wounded foes
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent ambush predator in aquatic encounters
